Corral program verifier version 1.1.8.0

Usage error: Unknown command line argument: -?
Usage: cba fname [Flags]

-------------------------------------------------------------
Flags:
 /k:int             	 Sets execution context bound
 /main:str          	 Sets main procedure name
 /recursionBound:int	 Set recursion depth bound
 /trackAllVars      	 Track all shared variables.
 /track:str         	 Track variable str.
 /useArrayTheory    	 Use native array theory for z3.
                    	 (This doesn't allow user-defined types.)
 /timeLimit:n       	 Set Z3 timeout to n sec (default 500)
 /flags:file        	 Read flags from file.
 /printBoogieExt 	 Prints language extensions made to Boogie

-------------------------------------------------------------
